tool_args.label: Throgs Neck Bridge Concrete Slab Incident
tool_args.raw_text: a 16-foot-long, 37,000-pound concrete slab had become unsecured and fallen off a moving flat-bed truck, landing squarely across the Queens-bound right lane and part of the center lane of the Throgs Neck Bridge

payload.claim_text: A 16-foot-long, 37,000-pound concrete slab fell off a flat-bed truck onto the Queens-bound lanes of the Throgs Neck Bridge on August 26, 2022
payload.description: Incident at tail-end of morning rush hour on Friday, August 26th. TBTA, MTA C&D, and contractor Judlau coordinated to clear the roadway before Friday afternoon rush.

evidence_refs.source_quote: a 16-foot-long, 37,000-pound concrete slab had become unsecured and fallen off a moving flat-bed truck, landing squarely across the Queens-bound right lane and part of the center lane of the Throgs Neck Bridge

tool_args.label: Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge Collision Mitigation
tool_args.raw_text: DOT and MTA Construction & Development (C&D) have been studying that specific off-property area and a project is going to be started to improve it
